short_summary: Iran deal stalled, China espionage, consulate attack
rationale: Tehran's public contradiction of Trump's Iran deal claim is a fresh credibility and foreign policy story; China detaining another US academic sustains tension; Toronto consulate attack is a security incident involving US property.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Tehran publicly contradicts Trump's claim of a near-deal, creating a fresh credibility and foreign policy story with potential oil market implications for US consumers.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China on espionage charges sustains US-China tension; relevant to Americans traveling or working in China and to broader bilateral relations.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating US consulate attack
top_events.summary: An attack on the US consulate in Toronto with a Canadian officer shot is a direct security incident involving US diplomatic property; monitoring warranted but no escalation confirmed.
